recommendations.title: Be Sick… It's Free
recommendations.overview: Comedy about the flawed Italian healthcare system of the time and a doctor's expeirence with it.

recommendations.title: No Date, No Signature
recommendations.overview: Kaveh Nariman is a Doctor in the medical examiner's office. One day at his work he meets a corpse which is very familiar to him.

recommendations.title: Neverwas
recommendations.overview: Zach Riley is a psychiatrist, who leaves a job at a prestigious university, to take up a job at the privately run mental institution, Millwood. What he doesn't reveal at the time of his appointment is that this was the very place where his novelist f

recommendations.title: La luna
recommendations.overview: A young boy comes of age in the most peculiar of circumstances. Tonight is the very first time his Papa and Grandpa are taking him to work. In an old wooden boat they row far out to sea, and with no land in sight, they stop and wait. A big surprise a

recommendations.title: Turtles Can Fly
recommendations.overview: Turtles Can Fly tells the story of a group of young children near the Turkey-Iraq border. They clean up mines and wait for the Saddam regime to fall.

recommendations.title: The Map of Tiny Perfect Things
recommendations.overview: Two teenagers trapped in an endless time loop set out to find all the tiny things that make that one day perfect.

recommendations.title: Insanitarium
recommendations.overview: After he's institutionalized in order to cover for his sister, a young man encounters a doctor who is turning his patients into flesh-eating psychopaths.

recommendations.title: Asylum
recommendations.overview: A young psychiatrist applies for a job at a mental asylum and must pass a test by interviewing four patients. He must figure out which of the patients, is in fact, the doctor that he would be replacing if hired.

recommendations.title: The Holy Innocents

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: The Husbands of River Song
